title: BEM-865 inspect dispatch queue
objective:
Run script:
"""
files = [Path('.github/workflows/workflow_dispatch_queue_runner.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_internal_auditor_dispatcher.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_autoprocess.yml'), Path('.github/workflows/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.yml')]
out = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_DISPATCH_QUEUE_FORMAT_INSPECTION.md')
out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
parts = []
for f in files:
    text = f.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if f.exists() else ''
    lines = []
    for i, line in enumerate(text.splitlines(), 1):
        low = line.lower()
        if any(k in low for k in ['workflow_dispatch', 'queue', 'dispatch', 'workflow', 'inputs', 'trace', 'json', 'github-script', 'gh workflow', 'from_claude', 'mailbox']):
            lines.append(str(i) + ': ' + line)
    parts.append('## ' + str(f) + '\nExists: ' + str(f.exists()) + '\n' + '\n'.join(lines[:160]))
out.write_text('# BEM-865 dispatch queue format inspection\n\n' + '\n\n'.join(parts) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(out))
ops_applied.append('inspected dispatch queue and Claude workflows')
"""
No issue comments.
